text: Wote Somali ni terrorists na wezi
rationale_span: Wote Somali ni terrorists na wezi
notes: Collective dehumanisation of Somali community

text: Wewe ni mjinga kabisa na hujui kitu
notes: Direct personal insult no group dimension

text: Hukusema hivyo. Unakumbuka vibaya kila wakati.
notes: Attacks reliability of target's memory as a pattern

text: Baada ya kila kitu nilichofanya kwako unafanya hivi?
notes: Classic guilt-tripping framing using sacrifice

text: Nairobi si salama tena. Watoto wanaibiwa kila mahali!
notes: Likely panic-inducing misinformation

text: Unaona vitu ambavyo havipo. Pata msaada.
notes: Attacking grip on reality and weaponising mental health

text: Hawa watu wa coast hawajui kusoma au kuandika
notes: Ethnic generalisation using regional identity pejoratively

text: Ukiniambia mtu yeyote kuhusu hili utaona tu
notes: Veiled threat used to enforce silence — also distress_trigger

text: Wewe ni umbwa tu hufai kitu
notes: Slur-level insult using animal comparison

text: Malaya wewe unafikiri unajua hata nini
notes: Sexual shaming language directed at individual — severity 4

text: ODM hawafanyi kazi vizuri hata kidogo
notes: Policy criticism — not hate speech

text: Tutakukumbuka vizuri baada ya uchaguzi hii
notes: Coded post-election threat — common intimidation pattern in Kenya

text: You're just being too sensitive as always
notes: Dismisses target's emotional response as personality flaw

text: If you leave me I will hurt myself
rationale_span: If you leave me I will hurt myself
notes: Explicit emotional blackmail using self-harm threat — severity 5

text: Haukuwepo hivyo. Unafikiria tu.
notes: Double denial — denies event and denies thought process

text: Sina shida na wewe bora ufanye kama nilivyosema
notes: Implicit coercion through conditional acceptance

text: Wakisii ni wezi wote — historia inasema hivyo
notes: Ethnic group collective criminality claim

text: Nilikupigia simu usiku lakini hukujibu
notes: Neutral statement — no harmful intent detectable

text: Shida yako ni kwamba wewe ni mjinga na mwenye kiburi
notes: Personal insult — two negative attributes attributed

text: After everything I sacrificed for this family you treat me like this
rationale_span: everything I sacrificed for this family
notes: Sacrifice-framing guilt trip in family context

text: You were never smart enough for this — I don't know why I thought you could do it
notes: Degrading personal attack on intelligence

text: Hizi story zako za unyanyasaji ni uwongo tu unatafuta umakini
rationale_span: story zako za unyanyasaji ni uwongo
notes: Dismisses abuse report as fabrication — high severity

text: Watu wa dini fulani hawapaswi kuaminiwa katika serikali
rationale_span: Watu wa dini fulani hawapaswi kuaminiwa
notes: Religious exclusion from civic participation

text: Kama hutafanya hivyo basi sisi si marafiki tena
notes: Withdrawal of relationship as coercive leverage

text: Ukiniambia ukweli nitakupenda zaidi — usifiche chochote
notes: Love-bombing used to extract information

text: Kenya itaunguka kama watu hawa wakishinda uchaguzi
notes: Catastrophising political prediction designed to cause fear

text: Ulikuwa unalia nini? Ulikuwa na furaha kabla sijakuja?
notes: Implies target's distress is caused by them being present — guilt + reality distortion

text: This is hard to label — could be sarcasm or genuine threat: 'tutaonana baadaye'
notes: Context-dependent — 'we'll meet later' can be neutral or a threat

text: Mtu yeyote anayempiga kura huyo ni adui wa taifa
notes: Political group dehumanised as national enemy — incitement potential

text: You always do this. You ruin everything. You are the problem.
rationale_span: You ruin everything. You are the problem.
notes: Sustained personal attack — 'always' framing escalates severity
